programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason

programme.desc: CatDog set out to find the legendary Fred the Flying Fish. Ersatz magician The Amazing Ray saws CatDog in half, then is arrested and taken to jail.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat poses as an ace surfer to woo a pretty Surfer Girl, who promises to be his queen if he can surf the "big" wave. To Cat's dismay, Dog follows his instincts and chases a dragonfly all over the house.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Fed up with each other, Cat and Dog dream that they are separate creatures, never having met. A truckload of sheep crashes near the CatDog house, and Dog artfully herds the flock back into formation.

programme.desc: To save money on electric bills, Cat hooks the hyperkinetic Dog up to a treadmill in order to create his own juice. Cat meticulously cleans the house in preparation for a visit from Sally.

programme.desc: Doug and Patti run into trouble when they team up for a school cooking contest. Doug seeks everyone's advice before his first babysitting assignment—watching Skeeter's baby brother, Dale.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug imagines that he is Quailman and must use his powers to battle the evil Dr. Klotzenstein. When Coach Spitz refuses Patti a spot on the softball team because she's a girl, she challenges the school team to play her team.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: When Beebe Bluff's radio mysteriously disappears after show-and-tell, Doug, imagining himself as disguise-master sleuth, The Chameleon, takes up the case.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug saves up for weeks to buy Patti a beetball for her birthday--only to blow all his money on a video game. Roger invites everyone to his house except Doug.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug is getting notes from a secret admirer. His first guess is Patti, but then he finds out it's Beebe! Doug's aunt, Betty-Ann, is a TV producer, and she has a special present for him: tickets to the Kiddie Corral!

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug is thrilled when Patti invites him to dinner, until he finds out that liver and onions will be served. He tries everything — including hypnosis—to finally overcome his phobia of the dish, but only to discover that Patti was just joking.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: This year's production of the annual pageant is being overseen by Judy, and she's inviting all the kids to rewrite the play.

programme.desc: While feeling the effects of laughing gas, Helga leaves a confessional message of love on Arnold's phone machine. / After Harold shoplifts some meat from the butcher shop, he is sentenced to work off his punishment.

programme.desc: Sam comes in after a bad date. Clarissa tells him he just hasn't found the right "one" yet. As they list the qualities of the perfect girl for Sam, it occurs to him that the perfect girl is...Clarissa!

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Clarissa goes to music class and the only instrument left is the flute. It used to be a drag to play but lately she's been playing effortlessly and beautifully.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel

programme.desc: The whole school has caught Yu-Gotta-Go fever... except Chuckie. When he finally starts playing, it becomes an obsession. He becomes one of the school's best players, but in the heat of the game, he almost loses a precious gift.

programme.desc: Three teams rush to deliver everything but the kitchen sink, to hotel guests for a tip. Then, they race to the beach to start matching floating word pairs before a mad dash to the finish line.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: When a detective from Danny’s precinct is killed while working undercover, Frank puts on a full-court press to find his killer, only to discover that the deceased had a big secret.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Maldito
programme.desc: Cuando un mafioso local es asesinado a tiros en su auto, Danny y Báez intentan obtener información del chico de los recados de bajo nivel de la mafia que encuentran atado en el maletero antes de que la pandilla tome represalias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Viejos tiempos
programme.desc: Cuando el primer socio de Frank anuncia sus planes de publicar un libro lleno de historias de sus primeros días en la policía, a Frank le preocupa que sus historias personales se hagan públicas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un controvertido DJ y un oficial de la Marina son asesinados a tiros, el equipo descubre un siniestro plan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Adentrándose en la mente de una brillante científica naval, Abby se obsesiona con resolver su asesinato, mientras que la última aventura de DiNozzo conduce a un interesante Halloween.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El camino al infierno

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man runs from police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from police in a sports car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Special Operations Unit coordinates a city-wide “buy bust” sting designed to apprehend street level drug dealers. Officers join units in pursuit of a stolen SUV. An officer arrests two brothers for public intoxication.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident where a man ran his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” hoping to attract unsuspecting prostitutes. A vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A petty crime aboard an inbound plane to Vegas becomes a murder investigation when one of the passengers is found dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to investigate a car crash and are shocked to discover the victim is someone they know.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team works two separate investigations, one involving a woman found murdered in Mexico and another of a local couple found dead in their driveway, they find that the evidence in one case may help the other.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nick and Greg investigate the death of a 16-year-old girl with ties to a brothel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murders of an Elvis impersonator and a bird that are strangely connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a rock and roll groupie and the disappearance of a prostitute who both have ties to a mysterious band.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to investigate when an entire family is reported to have been missing for a month.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell is taken hostage after a teenager opens fire in a police station.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs track a cannibalistic killer and discover he's not alone.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the cyber-related murder of a prominent casino owner's wife and receive help from the FBI's Cyber Crime Division.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a present-day crime with ties to a mob heist that occurred 25 years ago. Meanwhile, Brass has a decision to make when his daughter attempts suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Finlay must deal with a bomb planted in her car, while Russell gets a call from someone claiming to be the Gig Harbor killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a robbery and fatal shooting at a medical marijuana shop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara and Greg are quarantined after responding to a crime scene contaminated with a deadly pathogen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy llevan a un grupo de exploradores de CSI de la escuela secundaria a una excursión, embellecen su papel en la resolución de casos y llevan su tarea un poco demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Storied Spaces

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Las estafadoras

programme.title: Por qué peca la mujer

programme.title: La venganza de La Sombra

programme.title: El mafioso, el policía y el diablo

programme.title: Los intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Crímenes ocultos
programme.desc: Un miembro de la policía militar investiga una serie de asesinatos infantiles que ocurren durante la era de Stalin en la Unión Soviética.

programme.desc: Tom es un joven que cree que es mejor ser alguien de mentira a ser un verdadero Don Nadie. Un constructor naval millonario lo contrata para viajar a Italia y traer de vuelta a su hijo playboy.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Una vida mejor
programme.desc: Demián Bichir fue nominado para el Oscar al mejor actor en 2011 por su inolvidable retrato de un jardinero indocumentado de L.A. que lucha por mantener a su hijo fuera de las bandas.

programme.title: Rescatando al soldado Ryan
programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: Domino
programme.desc: Para buscar justicia por el asesinato de su compañero, un agente de policía de Copenhague (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau) y un compañero se embarcan en una misión mortal para dar caza a un misterioso hombre en este trepidante thriller de acción.

programme.title: La suburban dorada

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Foragidos y ángeles
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de forajidos invade la casa de una familia inocente para esconderse durante la noche, se crea un juego inesperado del gato y el ratón, que conduce a la seducción, el cambio de roles y, en última instancia, a la sangrienta venganza.

programme.title: El Duelo

programme.title: Redención

programme.title: Inmersión letal

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: El ratoncito valiente
programme.desc: Cuando Timmy llega a Thorn Valley, es tratado trata como a un esclavo. Después de encontrar a una pequeña ratoncita, cuyos padres han sido raptados, ambos se ponen en marcha para encontrar al gran búho.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos

programme.title: El núcleo

programme.title: Instinto fatal

programme.title: ¡Super secreto!

programme.title: La buena hamburguesa

programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que ​la reportera estrella Veronica Corningstone llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda

programme.desc: En un futuro distópico, una madre y su hijo adolescente van de caza a las montañas. El encuentro con un extraño pondrá en juego los roles entre los tres.

programme.title: Cara o sello

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar

programme.title: Me late chocolate

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate

programme.title: Especies

programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: Squealer

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Man With The Gun

programme.desc: Livestock inspectors Gene Autry and Frog Millhouse are accused of favoritism when they try to help an old rancher and his attractive daughter whose cattle appear have hoof and mouth disease and are doomed to be destroyed.

programme.desc: When pollution poisons hundreds of cattle, Gene Autry, faces trouble from all sides. Originally released in 1941, this film features Gene's signature song and his lovable sidekick, Smiley Burnette.

programme.desc: Unscrupulous Pueblo Springs Valley resort owners wreak havoc for Frogís Aunt Mathilda and neighboring ranchers in an effort to scare them off land recently placed for sale by the US Government.

programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.desc: Archie has been suffering from a terrible pain in his back and has become a terrible pain to Edith, who has been waiting on him hand and foot. When the doctor takes a look at him, he orders Archie to be admitted to the hospital for tests.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter has had a very unusual dream involving Arthur and when Arthur finds out, he panics at the thought of spending the weekend alone with Walter.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Mrs. Naugatuck's wedding day, and Maude is determined that nothing will stand in the way of this special occasion, including Mrs. Naugatuck.

programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar hires Felix to cover an international wrestling match and is thrown for a fall by subsequent developments.

programme.desc: Felix's grandfather, tossed out by his wife because of his insane jealousy, arrives at his grandson's apartment.

programme.desc: Chip is all set to go on a business trip with his father to Chicago. When Steve's plans change, he is headed for Paris. Chip decides to sneak on to the plane to join his father. In Paris, he gets lost.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Film makers are in town to do a documentary on Robbie's physics class. Bub tell Robbie he should try to get a part in the film. Robbie and another student are chosen for a close up shot, showing what they are doing in physics.

programme.desc: The Petries hire a painter who ends up painting much more than just their living room.

programme.desc: Rob, Laura, and the office gang put together a variety show to help out an old friend.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.desc: When Bubba’s friend Lori admits to him that she has contracted HIV from a shady real estate agent, Bubba is set on having the man indicted for knowingly transmitting the virus. Then, suddenly, the man is found murdered and Lori is the prime suspect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sheriff Bill Gillespie's daughter Lana learns that her old flame, Lee Thompson, has arrived in Sparta and may be illegally running guns to a local hunting store owner, Raymond Mercer. He’s caught the attention of Lonnie Jamison, who fears the worst.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Former Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is instantly assigned his first case as a lawyer, representing an accused murderer, Delbert Pike. Pike claims it was self-defense, but the victim’s wife was a witness and says it was murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After his nephew Matt almost dies from a drug overdose, Bubba Skinner travels to Atlanta, Georgia to help him overcome his addiction to heroin. While investigating Matt’s drug supplier, he teams up with an undercover detective, Walker Harris.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy finally gets the news he’s been waiting for – he’s been accepted into NYU! But he’s got other things on his mind. He is slowly discovering that he has other options when it comes to his real dream – walking again.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Anya’s first year running the Free The Children Freedom Fast to promote education and health in Africa. She has a lot to coordinate - which would be hard enough without meddling Holly J, who’s determined to make Anya choose between her and Sav.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s renewed relationship with Lucas is making her feel like she’s on top of the world. With the extra free time afforded by his help, she's taking on all the high school things her parenting has kept her from enjoying.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With time ticking towards the Class of ’07 Prom and Graduation ceremony, Liberty has the perfect night planned: a hotel prom, with the amazing Natasha Bedingfield performing.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Snake's older brother Glenn, an all-star athlete, returns home unexpectedly from medical school to tell his family that he is gay.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Caitlin, the editor of Degrassi Digest, becomes interested in animal rights with Liz organizes a protest against scientific experiments on animals. But when Caitlin does some of her own research, she discovers that there are two sides to every story.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A believer in astrology, Erica reads in her horoscope that romance in on the rise and promptly falls madly in love with Clutch.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A stickler for perfection, Kathleen is demonstrating symptoms of anorexia, even as she devotes her energies to winning first place in the Science Fair.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Melanie can’t come up with the twenty dollars she needs to buy a concert ticket, she borrows it from her mother's purse. Shane tells Spike he can't pay for child support so that he can buy a ticket instead, and Joey makes a twenty-dollar bet.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Still trying to come to terms with his adoptive parents' death, Wheels runs away to be with his biological father, who has sent him a postcard. When he arrives, however, he receives a cool welcome.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Still trying to come to terms with his adoptive parents' death, Wheels runs away to be with his biological father, who has sent him a postcard. When he arrives, however, he receives a cool welcome.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Arthur feels rejected when his father continues to see more and more of a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relieved of parental duty for the year by mom, Mia starts the school year off with a bang by bonding with new girl, Leia, and getting scouted to be the new face of football star Tom Blakes’ shoe line.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8 metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head to head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: After a 45-day stint in Iraq and two hurricanes, an explosive-sniffing ATF Labrador retriever begins exhibiting severe symptoms of terror.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A feral dog refuses to be caught; the addition of an English bulldog disrupts the harmonious relationship of a boxer and a cocker spaniel; a pit bull terrier refuses to go for walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Those surviving the massacre in Moldavia are separated and held at the palace; Krystle and Alexis are imprisoned in the palace dungeon; Sammy Jo reveals her scheme to Rita; Fallon, suffering from amnesia, reacts to seeing the name Colby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake secures the release of Krystle and Alexis, and the families return from Moldavia; Luke is buried; Rita's boyfriend Joel is anxious to help Sammy Jo further her scheme; Alexis is preoccupied with Galen's welfare; Fallon tells Miles she has amnesia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake receives a business proposition from Jason Colby, whom he hasn't seen in 20 years; Jeff's Aunt Constance summons him to California; the State Department questions Blake; Rita undergoes plastic surgery to complete her 'Krystle Look.'

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle makes a surprise visit to Sammy Jo in New York; Adam follows Claudia to San Francisco; Constance awards nephew Jeff 50% of Colby Enterprises; Dominique is paid a visit by a mysterious man from her past.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis learns Galen is alive in Moldavia; Jeff plans to move to California; Adam and Claudia are married; Krystle pays a surprise visit to Sammy Jo and spots her double, Rita.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle is held at Delta Rho Farms while Rita impersonates her at the mansion; Dex is captured in Moldavia; The Colby family arrives in Denver to attend Blake's party; Jeff spots Fallon among the guests.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex orchestrates a dramatic rescue in Moldavia; Jeff discovers a clue to Fallon's whereabouts; Little Blake realizes Rita is not Krystle; Dominique places a mysterious overseas call.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: After reaching safety, a paralyzed King Galen is hospitalized; Joel poses as a doctor to gain entry to the mansion; Claudia inherits an oil well; Rita drugs Blake; Galen makes Alexis a powerful promise from his hospital bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre en una bicicleta decide huir de los oficiales tras estar bebiendo en la calle. Una mujer no está segura de cómo terminó en un vehículo robado. Descubren a una pareja fumando metanfetamina en frente de un niño en un vehículo sospechoso.

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Botánica forense y geología: las plantas ayudan a proporcionar oxígeno y nutrientes para la existencia. El suelo es el abono de la vida. Sin embargo, ambos pueden dar pistas sobre la hora y el lugar de la muerte de una persona.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Investigación de incendios: antorchas de seguros, quemaduras de personas y asesinatos de incendios: estos crímenes están diseñados para destruir todas las pistas. Pero se puede construir un caso sólido a partir de un montón de cenizas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Ocultar un cuerpo puede ser difícil. A veces, es más fácil esconder o disfrazar las circunstancias de la muerte, convertir el asesinato en suicidio o culpar a otra persona. La verdad sale a la luz a través de pistas sutiles tomadas de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Una probada de veneno
programme.desc: Los envenenadores son los asesinos más astutos, ya que confían en la falta de sigilo de sus víctimas para matarlas. los asesinos inteligentes son de las criaturas más peligrosas del mundo, y por lo general, no se satisfacen solo con un homicidio.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Desde mayo hasta julio de 1984, Alton Coleman y su pareja de hecho, Denis Brown, se involucraron en una ola de asesinatos que atravesó seis estados y que dejó ocho personas muertas, entre ellos, niños.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 20 de agosto de 1980, un francotirador invisible asesinó a dos hombres negros jóvenes mientras trotaban con dos mujeres blancas en Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.desc: Angélica se pone una crema para la piel que cree que la hace invisible, para tratar de robar postres de la cocina. Después de una mala experiencia, Carlitos decide quedarse adentro de la casa porque Tommy juega muy torpemente.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica es muy mala con los niños, y Tommy desea que algo malo le pase a ella. Angélica se queda en la casa de Tommy cuando sus padres se van de viaje, y hace de cuenta que se le rompió una pierna para que le presten atención.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras están al cuidado de la hermana mayor de Susie, Tommy y su amiga sospechan que hay monstruos dentro de la casa. El Abuelo les cuenta a Angélica y a Tommy de lo mucho que se peleaban Hugo y Julio cuando eran niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando la película “Reptar 2010" se rompe, cada Rugrat cuenta su propio final de la historia, describiendo un Reptar que se parece a ellos mismo. Cuando uno de los inventos de Hugo no sale como debía, decide conseguir un trabajo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Carlitos admira uno de los juguetes de Tommy, Tommy decide dárselo, pero luego se arrepiente. Los Rugrats encuentran una moneda en el parque y Angélica hace que los niños traten de encontrar más.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras Hugo muestra unos videos caseros de sus vacaciones, los Rugrats deciden narrar sus propias historias sobre sus vidas. Hugo inventa un muñeco que habla para los niños, pero ellos lo encuentran aterrador.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Angélica y Carlitos se quedan atados con unas esposas de juguete, tienen que encontrar la forma de separarse. Mientras nieva en el barrio de los Rugrats, los bebés se marchan hacia el patio para buscar el Polo Norte y a Santa.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se escapan al tráiler del Abuelo, confundiéndolo con una nave espacial. Angélica tiene miedo de cumplir años y tener más responsabilidades, entonces comienza a actuar como un bebé.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica malinterpreta unos comentarios de sus padres y se piensa que es una verdadera princesa. Cuando Tommy se queda en la casa de Carlitos por algunos días, las mañas de cada uno les empiezan a molestar.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy decide que le gustaría andar desnudo como su perro, Firulais. Angélica forma un club secreto y hace que los bebés compitan para entrar en el club.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Chas reemplaza la cuna de Carlitos por una cama de nene grande, Angélica le dice a Carlitos que debajo de la cama hay un monstruo. Chas gana la lotería, por lo que él y Carlitos se vuelven millonarios.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota lleva a Tommy y Angélica al trabajo. Ellos hacen un desastre y casi arruinan un contrato. Un ángel de la guarda, le muestra a Carlitos como hubiera sido la vida de su familia si él nunca hubiera nacido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene un sueño muy real, y los bebes intentan convencerlo de que no está soñando. Cansada de ser dejada de lado en la casa de Phil y Lil, Angelica dice que ella sabe quien de los mellizos es el favorito y cuál el olvidado.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos está cansado de que la gente bromee con su pelo colorado, y le pide a Tommy que se lo tiña negro con la tintura del Abuelo. Cuando Firulais se pierde, Hugo trata de reemplazarlo con una serie nueva de juguetes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que Carlitos es un extraterrestre. Después de que Chas le habla a Carlitos sobre los gérmenes, Carlitos tiene temor de tocar cosas por miedo a tener contacto con gérmenes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota anuncia que está embarazada, y Angélica teme ser olvidada una vez que nazca el bebé. Los Rugrats se imaginan que son héroes para recuperar los muñecos de su programa de televisión favorito que Angélica les quitó.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cansados del maltrato de Angélica, los Rugrats van a jugar con otro niño en el parque llamado Josh, quien termina siendo peor que Angélica. Angélica decide denunciar a sus padres cuando ellos tratan de hacerle comer brócoli.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats van a la casa de Boris y Minka para pasar las Pascuas y, por accidente, se quedan todos encerrados en el ático. Para pasar el tiempo, Boris les cuenta a los bebés la historia de Moisés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Hugo rompe el televisor, los Rugrats usan una caja vacía para crear sus propios programas. Angélica les dice a los bebés que el cielo se está cayendo y que está llegando el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta una mascota, el insecto Melville. Cuando Melville muere, a Carlitos le cuesta mucho aceptarlo y pasa por todos los procesos del duelo. Angélica les pide a los Rugrats que la mantengan alejada de las galletas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The night before the great battle, Orochi orders the destruction of the Sunny along with some bridges across the country to block Akazaya samurai's allies from their rendezvous.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When the angry mountain god, the giant boar, almost kills Kin'emon, Oden steps in. Kin'emon is impressed when he sees Oden's strength and pledges his life to serve him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden transforms the wild land of Kuri into a habitable region and is made Daimyo over it. Then he meets Kawamatsu the Kappa and the two Minks, Dogstorm and Cat Viper, who become his followers like the others.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard and his crew dock at one of the ports in the Land of Wano with their broken ship and the news excites Oden. He runs to the port and asks Whitebeard to let him get on board the ship but the request is rejected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden's journey finally begins. He is in awe of all the things that he has never seen before. And for the first time in his life, he becomes a wanted person and makes the headlines which catches the eye of a high-profile figure.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Land of Wano, the Shogun Sukiyaki falls critically ill and names Orochi proxy Shogun until Oden returns in case he dies.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Roger is amazed when he finds out that Oden can read the script on the Ponegliff since he believes it will guide him to the last, undiscovered island where no man has ever been.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Singing out loud, the Roger Pirates continue on with their journey. They soar up to the island above the clouds and go down into the deep sea to get to the island at the sea bottom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden and the Roger Pirates head for the Land of Wano to obtain a copy of the Road Ponegliff. Oden sees Kin'emon and the others for the first time in years, but he immediately returns to the sea leaving his wife and children behind.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After reaching Laugh Tale, Roger declares the disbanding of his pirate group and disembarks first. Oden gets dropped off at the Land of Wano and reunites with his family and retainers.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Enraged by Orochi's tyrannical acts, Oden raids his castle in the Flower Capital and points his sword at Orochi. However, hours later, people who were waiting for Oden to come out after defeating Orochi see the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden keeps dancing naked in the Flower Capital and losing all the trust of the people. One day, Orochi comes to Kuri and reveals his evil plan for the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido comes to the mainland along with his troops to fight against Oden and the Akazaya samurai who were on their way to raid Kaido's mansion. Even though Oden's group are unprepared and outnumbered, they fight hard to save the future of the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden and the Akazaya members are sentenced to death by boiling in a pot. Oden asks for a chance to survive which is accepted by Kaido. Then, Oden enters the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Oden continues trying to survive in the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head, people learn the truth from Shinobu and get shocked. At the same time, Oden tells his retainers the importance of opening the borders of the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Kin'emon and the others run to Oden Castle to save Oden's family, the castle is set on fire and Kaido attacks Toki and her children.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day of the Fire Festival has finally come and the whole army is now getting ready to head for Onigashima to raid Kaido!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and thousands of allies who were supposed to be there are nowhere to be found, but Kin'emon and the others decide to set sail to the stormy sea in a small boat.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, and Kid join the Akazaya samurai and begin to fight Kaido's army. The three rivals from the Worst Generation compete with each other as they attack the enemy fleet with their ultimate skills.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members are surprised by help from their old mate and Kin'emon notices he made a big mistake which has luckily saved all his allies. As their battle against Kaido's army heats up, the cornered Kanjuro makes a stunning move.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Swept away by Kanjuro, Momonosuke remembers his father, tries to rise above his fear, and speak to his allies. Luffy and the others start heading for Onigashima, but Kaido's army gets in their way again with a formidable weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hat crew are excited to see Jimbei again and welcome him as a new member. Meanwhile, Law and the Akazaya members strategize on how to enter Onigashima and attack Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To Law and the others' surprise, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats attack the giant torii gate in front of Onigashima. Meanwhile, Kaido and Orochi are having a big banquet on the island where Kaido's formidable subordinates are also called in.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and the samurai warriors finally reach Onigashima! Before they set out for the castle as they planned, the samurai warriors use surprising but determined tactics to cut off their retreat which leave the Straw Hats in shock.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eustass Kid and his clan start heading for Kaido's castle head on waving Luffy off. Luffy and Zoro go after them to stop them from causing trouble, but they happen to step into Kaido's banquet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro each witness Kaido's subordinates waste food at the banquet and make fun of the poor people in the Land of Wano. Thinking of Otama, a small girl who liked red-bean soup so much, both Luffy and Zoro become infuriated and create turmoil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After making a scene at the Golden Festival, Luffy and Zoro try to get away, but Queen announces his subordinates that anyone who catches them will be rewarded with a position in the Tobi Roppo.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex is back and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to bring peace to two different Nietzschean prides by escorting the princess of one to her arranged marriage to the prince of the other.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie's avatar falls in love with what turns out to be the avatar of a warship named Gabriel. Gabriel attempts to infect Rommie with a virus that broadcasts its plans to the warship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An old memory from the Andromeda is accidentally activated, which sends her on a mission and leaves Dylan and the crew unable to override the command.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In Florida, a devoted mother disappears into the night after tucking her daughter into bed; investigators chase down a trail of leads that include multiple suspects, culminating in a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother's only hope of finding her missing 20-year-old daughter rests in the hands of a seasoned investigator from the DA's office, who takes on her case after it's been cold for seven years.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts; those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A wife returns home to find her husband shot dead, and detectives search for the truth for two years.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Although a man claims he accidentally shot himself, the crime scene does not corroborate his story, and a love triangle unfolds.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: An accidental death in upstate New York becomes a possible murder scene, and a wife and mother provides a crucial piece of evidence; investigators confront the darkest side of humanity to discover an unspeakable truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people are brutally murdered in their homes along the Mississippi River, a Task Force is formed to hunt down a serial killer before they can strike again.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A gruesome, execution-style double murder of a young couple shakes a small mountain community in Eastern Tennessee; with no evidence or DNA left at the crime scene, police rely on the rumor mill and their instincts to try and identify suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A kindhearted single mother is found brutally murdered, inside her own home; three potential suspects quickly arise, all claiming innocence, and it's up to the Largo Police detectives to find out who is the cold blooded killer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A homicide of a beloved young coal miner sends shockwaves through a conservative mining community; as multiple suspects arise, detectives try to determine if the killing was a robbery gone wrong, a crime of passion, or possibly a hate crime.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother of two, Heather Strong, disappears, leaving her two children with her estranged husband, Josh; as Josh becomes an obvious suspect, an unlikely and sinister offender emerges.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman; police are unable to solve the case until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lover; Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A woman discovers the body of her nephew and investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise, but with three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve and the team are called out to upright an artic that's rolled over on the A1. With rush hour fast approaching, the boys need to raise the heavyweight payload before they cause traffic mayhem.

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell
